name: Format support request
about: Request support for a new memory format

---

## Format name

[e.g. Mem0, Zep, Letta]

## Link to project

URL to the format's repository or documentation.

## Storage layout

Briefly describe how this format stores memories on disk (Markdown files? JSON? SQLite?).

## Why should memlink support this?

How many users would benefit from this bridge?
